# UI Spec

## Progress UI

- A small fixed status pill appears only while page translation work is active.
- Text format: `toktra 12/85` with optional `缓存 18` or `失败 2`.
- It must not cover selected-text translation panels.
- It must be removed by `removeTranslations()` / stop translation.
- No tutorial text, no large overlay, no persistent floating toolbar.

## Bilingual Rendering

- Keep source text visible.
- Render translations below block/link/button targets.
- Placeholder translations change the placeholder attribute and store the original for restore.
- Link and button translations must not be inserted inside clickable text.
